# AgentBridge default hook scripts — one entry per line.
# Hooks are written in JavaScript and run in-process via the embedded Rhino engine
# (see JsHookEngine), so a single .js file works on every OS and JetBrains IDE — no
# paired .sh/.ps1 variants and no external shell, PowerShell, or Node runtime.
# JSON configs are generated by DefaultHookProvisioner at startup.
scripts/_lib.js
scripts/run-command-abuse.js
scripts/run-in-terminal-abort.js
scripts/command-reprimand.js
scripts/check-stale-naming.js
